title: MOST REALISTIC MODPACK EVER
description: Minecraft so real you’ll need a medic and a shrink—bring on body systems, mental health
body:
# 🎮 MOST REALISTIC MODPACK EVER

Inspired by Vultures' YouTube video, this modpack makes Minecraft so real you'll need a therapist and a cardiologist. Designed for Minecraft 1.20.1 and built on Forge, it transforms the game into an intense, immersive, and often unforgiving survival experience — without changing the core visuals too much.

## 🧠 Main Features:

### 🔬 Realistic Body & Mind Systems
- **Body Systems**: FirstAid, Cold Sweat, Heart Attack Mod (yes, fear can kill you)
- **Mental Health**: Sanity & Depression mods — survive not just physically, but emotionally

### ⚔️ Combat & Physics Overhaul
- **Realistic Physics**: Physics Mod, NoCubes, Camera Overhaul
- **Better Combat**: playerAnimator, First Person Model, Better Combat

### 🎨 Visual & Immersion Enhancements
- Bliss Shaders, 3D Skin Layers, True Darkness, Low Shield, Fresh Animations
- Low On Fire: makes fire less intrusive and more immersive

### 🚀 Performance Optimizations
- ModernFix, FerriteCore, Oculus, Embeddium, and ImmediatelyFast

## 🔧 Technical Info
- Built for **Forge 1.20.1**
- Requires **both Client & Server**
-⚠️ I did not create the video this modpack is based on. Full credit for the video concept goes to Vultures. Watch it here: [this YouTube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r6DhKuIMuGY)
- I take no credit for the individual mods used

---

Whether you're seeking realism, survival challenges, or just want Minecraft to feel uncomfortably real — this is the pack for you.
